creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
Apparently the secret is to=20

make deinstall reinstall=20

The original fault came on a rebuild of devel/icu and all the ports that =
depend on it. As the error message shows, avahi-app was failing on one =
of its own libraries linking against an older version (libicui18n.so.48) =
that had already been replaced by libicui18n.so.50=20

Not saying it's resolved but I have worked around it. Seems like that =
should never have happened.=20
